case_title: LYONS, PHILIP V vs. LENHART, EVELYN

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT LENHART, EVELYN
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-09-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYONS, PHILIP V COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-04-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
COURT TRIAL SET FOR 10-4-93, JURY WAIVED AT SETT. CONF. ON SEPT. 9, 1993 FOR N/A BY PARTIES.

#5 JDG WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK G. VAN HEST. 10:05 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W/COUNSEL KEVIN MCDONOUGH, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. A STIPULATED JUDGMENT READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 271-B RAYMOND AVE, SF. WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT EXECUTION STAYED TILL MIDNIGHT OCT. 22, 1993. IF DEFT COMPLIES PLTF WAIVES ALL BACKRENT, DAMAGES AND COSTS. FAILURE TO COMPLY, DEFT ALSO TO PAY $3,300.00 BACKRENT & DAMAGES PLUS COSTS. PLTF TO PREPARE THE STIP JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LENHART, EVELYN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 271-B RAYMOND AVE, S.F., STAYED UNTIL OCT-23-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE BY 23-OCT-93, PLTF SHALL RECOVER $3300.00 IN BACK RENT. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR ITS OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES.
